zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Jon Bardsen Lein於大約1530年出生在挪威奧-特洛德拉格利薩 吉可。她於1560年之前與John Bardsen Lein在挪威奧-特洛德拉格斯塔斯比格德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1588年在挪威享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: Lein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Juergen, Kurt, Oskar, Otto.
German: occupational name for a grower of or dealer in flax, from Middle High German līn ‘flax’. Compare Line .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads in Trøndelag named with Old Norse lein ‘slope’.

variants.name: Line
meanings: English: from the medieval female personal name Line, a shortened form of Cateline (see Catlin ) and of various other names such as Emmeline and Adeline, containing the Anglo-Norman French diminutive suffix -line (originally a double diminutive, composed of the elements -el and -in).
In some cases possibly also French (Liné): metonymic occupational name for a linen weaver or a linen merchant, from an Old French adjective liné ‘made of linen’.

variants.name: Leiner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Haya, Herschel, Isack, Noson.

Jewish (western Ashkenazic): name taken by someone who was good at chanting the Pentateuch at public worship in the synagogue or who regularly did so, from West Yiddish layner ‘reader’ (a derivative of West Yiddish laynen ‘to read’, which comes ultimately from Latin legere ‘to read’).
Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a flax grower or merchant, from German Lein ‘flax’ + agent suffix -er.

nameMeanings.name: Jon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: Jonathan
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

nameMeanings.name: Bardsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Bairdín ‘descendantof the bard’.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Jon Bardsen Lein was born about 1530, in Rissa kirke, Sør-Trøndelag, Norway. She married John Bardsen Lein before 1560, in Stadsbygd, Sør-Trøndelag, Norway. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1588, in Norway, at the age of 59.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Jon Bardsen Leinは約1530年にノルウェースoル-トルoンデラグリッサ キルクで生まれた。1560年以前にノルウェースoル-トルoンデラグスタドスブイグドでJohn Bardsen Leinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1588年にノルウェーで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Jon Bardsen Lein(은)는 대략 1530년 노르웨이 스o-트o들라그 리사 커크에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1560년 이전 노르웨이 스o-트o들라그 스타드스비그드에서 John Bardsen Lein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1588년 노르웨이에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.
